level_signals: 3–5 years of experience in a revenue marketing, lifecycle marketing, SDR, or email marketing role
Comp range $100K–$130K base consistent with mid-level IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–5 years of experience in a revenue marketing, lifecycle marketing, SDR, or email marketing role at a B2B SaaS company.

Strong sequence and copy skills: Proven ability to write effective outbound and nurture sequences that drive replies, engagement, and conversion. You know how to craft a compelling subject line, write concise email copy, and handle live email threads with prospects.

Marketing automation proficiency: Hands-on experience using tools like HubSpot, Outreach, Salesloft, or similar platforms to build audiences, trigger sequences, manage journeys, and track performance.
Audience and positioning instincts: Ability to take a target persona and value proposition and translate them into messaging that resonates.
User journey thinking: You can conceptualize when and how to message people based on their lifecycle stage, engagement signals, and triggers.
Data-driven and experimental: Comfortable running A/B tests, analyzing sequence performance, and using conversion data to iterate on strategy.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: SDR experience (optional): Direct experience as an SDR or BDR gives you the intuition for what messaging actually books meetings and what gets ignored.
Experience with AI-powered SDR and sales engagement platforms.
Previous experience at a high-growth startup where you've worn multiple hats and built programs from 0 → 1.
Familiarity with CDPs, data warehouses, or the modern data stack ecosystem.

scope.surface: Lead-to-pipeline conversion systems: demo request follow-up, email nurture, marketing automation sequences, and automated outbound
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end follow-up process for demo requests, form submissions, and event leads
Build and optimize sequences in Unify to convert qualified demos to opportunities
Own campaign launch emails, evergreen communications, and multi-touch nurture sequences in HubSpot and Hightouch
Partner with events and campaigns team to build prioritized follow-up sequences
Manage product overage communication cycle to drive expansion revenue
Build triggered outbound campaigns in Unify based on intent signals and engagement data
Run A/B tests across subject lines, send times, copy, and sequencing
Own and report on key conversion metrics

compensation.equity_form: ISO options with early exercise and 10-year post-termination exercise window

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($100K–$130K) and described as location-independent
Meaningful equity compensation with favorable terms (early exercise, 10-year post-termination window)
Clear ownership scope and metrics defined in JD
Role is execution-heavy with explicit strategic growth path (automated outbound as net-new channel)
SDR experience explicitly listed as optional, lowering barrier to entry
red_flags: Role title says 'Enterprise' but JD body does not use the word 'enterprise' — potential mismatch between title and actual scope
E-Verify participation noted, which may restrict candidates without US work authorization; visa sponsorship stance is not explicitly stated beyond E-Verify mention
Unify is listed as a primary tool but is a relatively new/niche platform — limited candidate pool with direct experience
High execution demands with ownership of multiple end-to-end systems may indicate a lean team or limited support

Visa sponsorship is not explicitly addressed; E-Verify participation is mentioned but does not confirm or deny sponsorship — treated as unclear for visa_sponsorship, no-sponsorship for work_auth as a conservative inference
